allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs={k:v['version'] for k,v in d.get\('packages',{}\).items\(\) if 'storybook' in k and not k.endswith\('/node_modules'\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in list\(pkgs.items\(\)\)[:20]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('storybook version:', d['version']\)")
